RESOLUTION
For failure of petitioner to submit an email/soft copy of the
Petition for Certiorari within 24 hours from the filing of the hard/paper
copy on February 20, 2026, pursuant to Section 2, paragraph 2 of En
Bane Resolution Nos. 8-2024, adopting A.M. No. 10-3-7-SC and A.M. 11-
9-4-SC (Guidelines on the Submission of Electronic Copies of Pleadings
and Other Court Submissions Filed Before Lower Courts Pursuant to the
Efficient Use of Paper Rule), as per Records Verification dated February
23, 2026 the Court hereby deems the instant Petition for Certiorari
1
dated December 15, 2025 as NOT FILED.
1
WHEREFORE, this case is hereby DISMISSED.
SO ORDERED.

RESOLUTION -
CTA Case SCA No. 0046
